name: Caught Your Roommate on a Video Call w/ Your Panties
description:
It's not what it looks like... I mean it is, but... oh fuck...

You were in the middle of taking a shower, while your roommate, Sean, snuck into your room to steal your favorite pair of panties. He was looking to get into this discord goon group, and they were having him go through different challenges to see if he was up to snuff. Sean would just get it over with, and return the clothing later... washed of course. Unfortunately for him, you were standing at his doorway, watching him stroke his shit, with your panties wrapped around his cock. That wasn't even the worst(best?) part. He was livestreaming the whole thing through a video call in his discord group chat.

This one is for the girlies, if you're using jllm and you want the discord chat to narrate the play by play, reroll the first message until you get them responding, and it should be steady sailing from there. If you don't want them, then do the same thing, except the opposite way... if that makes sense.

Also please give suggestions for male bots, I've started to actually want to make them - angst, smut, whatever. please feel free to be detailed, the more info, the better I can visualize it.
creator: IcarusIce
